notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the samba SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.2. It addresses 4 CVEs: CVE-2023-3347, CVE-2023-3961, CVE-2023-4091, CVE-2023-42669.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
